description: Preset registry returns correct physical dimensions for `Letter`, `A4`, and `Legal`
Preset conversion helpers map preset dimensions to deterministic editor pixel sizes
AST schema accepts valid explicit print metadata with supported paper preset and positive uniform margin
AST schema rejects unknown paper preset values
AST schema rejects invalid uniform margin values outside the supported range
Legacy inference maps `816 x 1056` plus current page padding to a resolved `Letter` page configuration when explicit metadata is absent
Legacy inference recognizes known A4 page dimensions and resolves them to the `A4` preset when explicit metadata is absent
Explicit print metadata wins over inferred legacy width/height/padding when both are present
Workspace AST export preserves explicit print metadata on the template AST
Workspace AST import hydrates resolved page size and page padding from explicit print metadata
Saving and reopening a template preserves the selected paper preset and margin
Store action updates document/page node size, baseSize, width, height, and padding together in one logical change
Applying a paper preset updates both hidden document and page nodes to matching geometry
Applying a margin updates page layout padding to the resolved printable inset value
New designer workspaces bootstrap with explicit default print settings and matching document/page geometry
Designer UI renders named preset options `Letter`, `A4`, and `Legal` in a reachable page-setup control
Selecting `A4` from the paper preset control reshapes the visible design canvas without requiring page-node selection
Selecting `Legal` from the paper preset control reshapes the visible design canvas and ruler extents
Margin control accepts valid millimeter input and updates the resolved printable inset live
Margin control rejects or clamps invalid values instead of producing broken page geometry
Canvas artboard width and height derive from the resolved page preset rather than always using the legacy fixed constants
Preview paper shell no longer falls back to fixed `800px` width and `1123px` height when explicit print settings are present
Preview paper shell reflects the selected preset and margin for `Letter`
Preview paper shell reflects the selected preset and margin for `A4`
Authoritative preview export contains page width, height, and padding derived from the resolved print settings
Shared PDF print-options resolver returns the expected Puppeteer `format` and uniform `margin` for explicit print settings
Shared PDF print-options resolver produces consistent fallback output for legacy templates without explicit print metadata
Server-side PDF generation service passes resolved `format` and `margin` options to `page.pdf(...)`
Package-level billing PDF generation service passes resolved `format` and `margin` options to `page.pdf(...)`
Server and package PDF services resolve identical print options for the same template print settings
Invoice PDF API/service path generates a PDF successfully for a template with explicit paper preset and margin settings
Billing action PDF generation path generates a PDF successfully for a template with explicit paper preset and margin settings
Existing templates without explicit print metadata still load, preview, save, and generate PDFs successfully through fallback behavior
Regression suite covers schema, workspace round-trip, designer reshape, preview shell sizing, and both PDF settings paths
